created.description: Timestamp when the object was created

id.description: Unique identifier for the Network Zone

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the object was last modified

name.description: Unique name for this Network Zone

system.description:
Indicates a system Network Zone:
* `true` for system Network Zones
* `false` for custom Network Zones

The Okta org provides the following default system Network Zones:
* `LegacyIpZone`
* `BlockedIpZone`
* `DefaultEnhancedDynamicZone`
* `DefaultExemptIpZone`

Admins can modify the name of the default system Network Zone and add up to 5000 gateway or proxy IP entries.

usage.description: The usage of the Network Zone

_links.description: Specifies link relations (see [Web Linking](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc8288)) available using the [JSON Hypertext Application Language](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/draft-kelly-json-hal-06) specification. This object is used for dynamic discovery of related resources and lifecycle operations.

hints.description: Describes allowed HTTP verbs for the `href`

templated.description: Indicates whether the link object's `href` property is a URI template.

type.description: The media type of the link. If omitted, it is implicitly `application/json`.

hints.description: Describes allowed HTTP verbs for the `href`

templated.description: Indicates whether the link object's `href` property is a URI template.

type.description: The media type of the link. If omitted, it is implicitly `application/json`.
